which one is more beginner friendly helot or wanda <:__:1239909731125035058>

In general, anyone from purple faction is gonna be less beginner friendly cause of its mechanics (planning out multiple turns with first card usage). Wanda also wants more specific units for retaliation damage gameplay (starter units don't really help in that aspect). Meanwhile, you can slot in more units to help Helot out with her gameplay which is to just hold more strike cards for 1 hit nukes.
